page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing 32 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB per core. A key hardware feature is the inclusion of 3839 GB of local SSD storage, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-core operations. Single-core performance is weak, as evidenced by stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression ranking in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, consistently register in the average range. Memory bandwidth for both cached and uncached reads and writes also performs in the middle 50% tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i2gne.8xlarge delivers a high density of local SSD storage relative to its compute and memory resources, making it a viable option for storage-bound workloads without the overhead of external block storage. Given the average multi-core performance and database operation benchmarks, this instance is suited for database hosting, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing tasks that leverage local storage, while it is less suitable for single-threaded or CPU-bound sequential processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores operating at 2.5 GHz, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage. Running on a KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression tasks are weak, placing in the bottom 25% and 10% respectively, whereas multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations achieve average tier results. This hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for storage-dense configurations by bundling substantial local SSD capacity with dedicated compute resources. It is best suited for workloads such as database hosting, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing that require high local storage capacity but do not depend on high single-threaded CPU performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB local SSD storage, offering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.8xlarge is a storage-dense server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage.
tagline: A storage-dense server combining dedicated Intel Xeon cores with substantial local SSD capacity for balanced multi-core and database workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores with 128 GB RAM
3839 GB of integrated local SSD storage
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Weak single-core and single-threaded compression performance
Suited for database hosting and storage-heavy multi-threaded workloads
